scroll_found.title: Research the Infernal Passage scroll at a Research Pedestal

survive_nether.title: Survive 3 in-game days (72 minutes) in the Nether without dying

subtitle.text: Everything in the Nether is trying to kill you. The ThirstWasTaken bar drains at triple speed.

description: CH.06 · THE INFERNAL PASSAGE
▸ The Nether is not a biome you explore.
It is an environment that fights you continuously.
The scroll describes the survival protocol
that kept the Infernal civilization alive.
They are gone. The protocol remains.
◈ NETHER SURVIVAL CHECKLIST
└ ✓ Fire Resistance potion (minimum 2 for entry)
└ ✓ Water: 20+ purified water items
ThirstWasTaken drains at ×3 in Nether
You will run out before you expect to
└ ✓ Eiswein (Ch04): emergency full-heal
└ ✓ Food: smoked/salted (heat won't spoil smoked)
└ ✓ Bed: ▲ DO NOT sleep in Nether — it explodes
└ ✓ Compass: doesn't work in Nether
Use F3 coordinates. Build a trail.
└ ✓ Obsidian: in case you need another portal
◈ NETHER BIOME THREAT LEVELS
└ Nether Wastes: medium — ghasts, zombie piglins
└ Soul Sand Valley: high — skeleton walls,
Jaden's Nether Expansion adds new mobs
└ Crimson Forest: medium — hoglins, piglins
└ Warped Forest: low — only Endermen
└ Basalt Deltas: low mobs, high lava risk
└ Bastion Remnant: ▲ extreme — piglins attack on sight
◈ SCROLL: The Infernal Passage
└ Found in: Nether fortress chests, bastion loot
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: Nether survival checklist, biome threat map
▶ Find The Infernal Passage scroll [check]
▶ Survive 3 in-game days in the Nether [check]
◇ Jaden's Nether Expansion adds new Soul Sand Valley
mobs and items. The most dangerous is the
Soul Reaper. Don't fight it alone in Ch06.
